title: Purejoy Placemats and Coaster Sets 6, Christmas Table Mats PU Leather Heat-Resistant Washable and Non-Slip 43 * 30 cm Dinner Table Mats Set of 6 for Kitchen Table Mat Indoor Outdoor (Grey)
features: Complete table protection: The place mats are slip resistant, stain resistant. 0.2cm thick place mats and Heat Resistant up to 120℃(248°F), it effectively protect to desktop.

Eco-friendly materials and easy to clean: The placemats are made of PVC. Non-Slip, washable, laek proof not absorbent oil and easy to clean, just need to wipe with wet wipes. The place mats can be placed under the faucet for flushing.

Match to your family decoration: Traditional and simple design for all styles of furniture furnishings. Durable enough for everyday use, pretty enough for special occasions, like Wedding, family party, birthday party and so on.
PVC Place mats and Coasters Set Size: The table mats size is 43*30cm. coasters size: 10cm*10cm. Set of 6 place mats and set of 6 coasters included per package.

5 color to chose: Modern Nordic style fits most of the decorating styles. There are 5 colors easily change kitchen and dining’ room decorative theme, black, blue, beige, light gray, dark gray and will go with any as it a neutral colour.
